title: Codex capability spike: observe claimed capabilities on the installed CLI
action: Per D2 (advisor-expanded): READ-ONLY spike on the installed codex CLI (codex-cli 0.144.4). Controlled probing IS feasible via codex exec --ephemeral --ignore-user-config --json (advisor-verified); compare trust-bypassed vs normal-trust runs separately; record callback payloads and SOURCE PROVENANCE explicitly. Capability rows (each: verdict observed | not-observed | unknown + VERBATIM evidence; docs-page claims cap at unknown; every unknown states the reason and the live-probe follow-up needed): A1 .codex/agents/*.toml discovery incl. developer_instructions/model/sandbox_mode; A2 a named custom agent actually SELECTABLE and SPAWNED (not merely TOML parsing) + effective developer_instructions/model/sandbox observed + follow-up transport + start/stop identity metadata; B1 plugin manifest hooks key support; B2 default hooks/hooks.json pickup vs explicit manifest key; B3 repo (.codex/hooks.json) vs plugin hook precedence, duplicate-firing/XOR behavior, per-hook source provenance; C1 update_plan tool name reaching PostToolUse; C2 hook ABI: exact callback envelope, tool-name matching, cwd, source identity, ordering, stdout/exit semantics, failure semantics; D1 PreToolUse for agent spawns (Agent/spawn_agent matcher viability); E1 SubagentStart-equivalent event; F1 /hooks trust-state surface + machine-readable sources for: file-present, discovered, trusted, observed-this-session, permission mode, agent/skill discovery, duplicate sources (S6 doctor inputs). Advisor's own 0.144.4 observations to re-verify and cite: hooks/plugins/multi-agent enabled; doctor --json exposes NO hook discovery/trust/provenance/custom-agent rows; plugin list shows install state but not hook provenance. Existing evidence usable: .bee/logs/tools.jsonl + .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl rows from real Codex sessions in THIS repo count as observed for whichever events appear (cite verbatim rows). Ephemeral sandboxed probe sessions are allowed (that is what --ephemeral --ignore-user-config is for) but NO mutation of repo or user config, no secret-shaped reads. Output: .bee/spikes/codex-native-runtime-v2/capability-matrix.md (full evidence) and docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md — summary table with EVERY row id above, exactly one verdict per row, evidence-or-reason per row, and a Gating consequences section with explicit S3/S4/S6 verdicts.

truths: every row id (A1 A2 B1 B2 B3 C1 C2 D1 E1 F1) present with exactly one verdict and evidence-or-reason
matrix cites codex CLI version probed
gating consequences for S3, S4, S6 each stated explicitly
no repo or user config mutated
key_links: matrix distinguishes trust-bypassed vs normal-trust observations
prohibitions: No observed verdict from documentation alone
No mutation of repo or user config

verify: bash -c 'test -s .bee/spikes/codex-native-runtime-v2/capability-matrix.md && for r in A1 A2 B1 B2 B3 C1 C2 D1 E1 F1; do grep -q "$r" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md || exit 1; done && grep -qi "0.144" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md && grep -qi "S3" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md && grep -qi "S4" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md && grep -qi "S6" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md && echo MATRIX-OK'

trace.outcome: Codex 0.144.4 capability spike complete: 10-row matrix (A1..F1) with verdicts+verbatim evidence, trust-bypassed vs normal-trust distinguished, S3/S4/S6 gating stated. Observed: C1 (update_plan->PostToolUse), C2 (hook ABI envelope), D1 (spawn_agent->PreToolUse), F1 (trust gate live; doctor has no hook/agent rows). Not-observed: A1/A2 (.codex/agents/*.toml not discovered; only built-in default/explorer/worker spawnable), B1 (plugin_hooks feature removed). Unknown+followup: B2, B3, E1. Gating: S3 D6 defer / D7 proceed; S4 D8 defer / D10 proceed; S6 doctor fail-closed.
trace.verify_command: bash -c 'test -s .bee/spikes/codex-native-runtime-v2/capability-matrix.md && for r in A1 A2 B1 B2 B3 C1 C2 D1 E1 F1; do grep -q "$r" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md || exit 1; done && grep -qi "0.144" docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/capability-matrix.md && grep -qi "S3" ... && grep -qi "S4" ... && grep -qi "S6" ... && echo MATRIX-OK'
